indication: NERLYNX is a kinase inhibitor indicated as a single agent, for the extended adjuvant treatment of adult patients with early-stage HER2-positive breast cancer, to follow adjuvant trastuzumab based therapy.
description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration granted approval to neratinib for the extended adjuvant treatment of adult patients with early-stage HER2-positive breast cancer, to follow adjuvant trastuzumab based therapy.

document.name: Nerlynx (neratinib) [package insert]. FDA.
